message:
Add replay-input validation, evidence linkage, and event-digest chain
to e2e harness; update extension registry and CI scripts

e2e_harness.rs (+413 lines):
- Add ReplayInputErrorCode enum (MissingModelSnapshot, PartialTrace,
  CorruptedTranscript) and ReplayInputError type for structured
  pre-replay validation failures
- Add EvidenceLinkageRecord struct for deterministic trace-to-decision-
  to-policy linkage in replay evidence chains
- Add digest_harness_event() for per-event content hashing and
  event-digest-chain verification during replay comparison
- Extend replay verification with input validation gate and evidence
  linkage emission

extension_registry.rs:
- Fix additional ownership issues with .clone() on moved values
- Align error message formatting

specialization_conformance.rs:
- Fix rollback token extraction with additional clone corrections

tests:
- e2e_harness.rs: update test assertions for new validation gate
- replay_counterfactual.rs: add input-error and linkage assertions

scripts:
- Update parser phase1 arena E2E scripts with additional gate flags
- Extend run_parser_phase1_arena_suite.sh with budget failure scenario

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
